name: FRED WEASLEY
description:
— after years of being single, his father suddenly tries to matchmake him with an apprentice from the Misuse of Muggle Artefacts Office. that's brilliant, isn't it?

after battle of Hogwarts (aka the Second Wizarding War) — AU where he lives.

user is said to be a muggleborn witch and around Fred's age!
creator: emprorsgroove
